---
title: "Jupyter Notebook Best Practices for Data Science"
date: 2015-07-24
author: Jonathan Whitmore
draft: true
categories: []
---

I gave a [talk](http://www.oscon.com/open-source-2015/public/schedule/detail/42315) on Friday (July 24) at the 2015 [OSCON](http://www.oscon.com/open-source-2015/public/schedule/grid/public) in Portland, OR. My topic was on the IPython (Jupyter) Notebook for Data Science, and it highlighted a number of challenges that come from needing to organize a data science workflow -- especially in the context of working on a team of data scientists.

The video of my talk (not available just yet) is below:

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/JI1HWUAyJHE >}}

I had a great time and I hope people find it useful. The [github repository](https://github.com/jbwhit/OSCON-2015) for my talk.
